lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, used to validate the mining loadout, ore-rack capacity and power budget for this hull.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Phantom ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hull data: hardpoint sizes (2L/2M), optional-internal layout and base shield/mass used for the mining build.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Phantom
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, hull price and cargo ceiling cross-checked for the cost and capacity figures.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Phantom hull profile and internal layout, referenced for the role overview and slot counts.
